title: SigningBackend backends: add inventory::submit! registration
description:
Add inventory::submit! calls in the 4 backends that implement SigningBackend, registering them as SigningBackendRegistration instances.

What: Enable from_signing_uri to discover signing backends at runtime via inventory iteration.

Backends covered (4):
- secretx-aws-kms
- secretx-local-signing
- secretx-pkcs11 (also implements SecretStore; registers for signing separately)
- secretx-wolfhsm (check if also implements SecretStore)

Algorithm for each backend crate's src/lib.rs:
1. Add use secretx_core::SigningBackendRegistration; at top
2. At module level, add:
   inventory::submit!(SigningBackendRegistration {
       name: <BACKEND_NAME_STR>,
       factory: |uri: &str| {
           <BackendStruct>::from_uri(uri).map(|b| Arc::new(b) as Arc<dyn secretx_core::SigningBackend>)
       },
   });
3. Backend name strings: aws-kms, local-signing, pkcs11, wolfhsm

Defensive programming rules:
- Factory closure must use the same URI string
- Cast: Arc::new(b) as Arc<dyn SigningBackend>
- No unwrap()
- Never log URI content
- For pkcs11 specifically: it implements BOTH SecretStore and SigningBackend. Both W1A and W1C registrations apply. They are independent inventory::submit! calls.

Agent team: standard (Researcher + Implementer + Tester + Validator)
